title: Hyekit Custom Gaming Keyboard - Alice Layout 66 Keys - Support QMK/Via Programmable Key - Gasket Structure - USB C Wired Mechanical Keyboard Kit - RGB Hot Swappable Switches & Keycaps - Acrylic Shell
description:
Note:
This link only sells a kit, not a finished keyboard, you need to assemble it yourself, the kit does not include switches, keycaps, data cables, or stabilizers.
About This Item
1.FancyAlice66 keyboard kit Alice is equipped with 66 keys, ergonomic, yes typing is more comfortable.  2. Hot-swappable PCB uses Kailh hot-swappable socket and supports 3-pin and 5-pin mechanical switches.  3. 32U4 chip master, support QMK/VIA, kit supports QMK/VIA, more customized, you can use it to modify key functions and customize more functions.  4. South-facing RGB Backlit has 66 lamp beads + 16 bottom lamps, 16 million color RGB backlight makes the keyboard look more attractive.  5.Gasket Mount, equipped with Pom material positioning plate, poron sandwich surface, and poron pad, which makes the keyboard more comfortable and soft to type, and the typing sound is more pleasant.  6. Acrylic stacking shell, the texture is very good, enjoy the fun of custom assembling the shell.  7. Wired mode, support USB-C, typing response is faster, Type-c interface adapts to more data lines.  8. The kit needs to be assembled by yourself. First, ensure that you have a certain ability to assemble. You can refer to our assembly instruction video for assembly.  9.Support PCB Mounted and Plate Mounted stabilizers, we recommend you to use PCB Mounted stabilizers.
Package includes:
Keyboard case*1  PCB*1  Quiet sandwich cotton*1  Switch pad*1  Assemble some parts
features: 【Package Included】Keyboard case*1, PCB*1, Quiet sandwich cotton*1, Switch pad*1, Assemble some parts. No USB cables, switches, stabilizer, and keycaps. (Note, The kit needs to be assembled by yourself. you ensure that you have a certain ability to assemble. You can refer to our assembly instruction video for assembly. Let's enjoy the process of assembling the keyboard and the great sense of achievement brought by the successful assembly.)

【Custom Gaming Keyboard】Hot-swappable PCB uses Kailh hot-swappable socket and supports 3-pin and 5-pin mechanical switches. Support PCB Mounted and Plate Mounted stabilizers, we recommend you to use PCB Mounted stabilizers. 32U4 chip master, support QMK/VIA, more customized, you can use it to modify key functions and customize more functions. Wired mode, supports USB-C, typing response is faster.

【Alice Layout】The Alice layout considers the natural input angle of the wrist from the perspective of ergonomics. When using the conventional arrangement keyboard for continuous high-intensity input work, the unnatural bending of the wrist will easily lead to hand fatigue, and the Alice layout can solve this problem very well, it takes into account the integrity of the keyboard and the relatively relaxed input state of the wrist.

【South-facing RGB Backlit】Alice66 has 66 lamp beads + 16 bottom lamps, 16 million color RGB backlight, the RBG Backlight effect is very bright even in the daytime. The lower lamp position is designed so that the light will not be blocked by the switch. The fully transparent bottom cover allows the 16 bottom lights to display their backlight effects without obstruction, making the keyboard look more attractive.

【Acrylic Gasket Structure】Alice66 is designed with Gasket structure, equipped with Pom material positioning plate, poron sandwich surface, and poron pad, the sound is pure, and the feel is soft. This wonderful feel can make the typing process very pleasant and full of fun.

reviews.title: Sounds great with no mods
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:58cc2520e806ff1428542a1df7456920]] Assembly was pretty easy for this DIY kit. It even sounds great without any modifications. I decided to put poron switch pads on the pcb since the foam it came with did not line up properly. The feet that comes with this kit is too aggressive for my liking. I decided to remove it and put clear rubber bumpons

Did not come with stabilizers. I was hoping it does at this price point. Speaking of which, this kit can be had for cheaper on other retailers. But ordering from Amazon gave me more confidence.

My copy came with cracked and scuffed case. I messaged the seller directly and they were able to help and send me a new case promptly. They also helped with VIA setup on this keyboard.

Pros:
- easy assembly
- VIA support PCB
- great sound with little to no modifications
- south facing, per key RGB
- under glow lighting
- A+ great customer support from seller

Cons:
- price seems higher compared to other websites
- inconsistent craftsmanship
- no stabilizers included
- front of the keyboard can be wobbly with the aggressive feet riser installed

(Keycaps: MT3 2048; Switches: WS Aurora Clears)

The paint work is really good quality for how little they’re asking. The same thing can be found on other sites but more expensive than it on Amazon. Genuine 10/10 from me and highly recommend it.

title: Wireless Gaming Keyboard Mouse Combo,2.4G Wireless Rechargeable Backlit Keyboard+Optical 1600DPI Soundless Mouse with USB Receiver for Home Office Game Windows 2000/ME/XP/Vista/7/8/10,Mac (Pink)
description:
♐
The Multimedia Function Keys provides easy access to media,volume control,etc
【FN+F1】Music,【FN+F2】Volume-,【FN+F3】Volume+ 【FN+F4】Mute, 【FN+F5】Previous Track,【FN+F6】Next Track 【FN+F7】Play/Pause,【FN+F8】CD Stop,【FN+F9】Web browser  【FN+F10】Mailbox,【FN+F11】Computer,【FN+F12】Favorites 【FN+scrolk】Turn on/off backlight,【FN+pgup】Increase brightness 【FN+pgdn】Reduce brightness
Product detail information
Mouse Rated Working Current:≤10MA Keyboard Rated Working Current:≤40MA Optical Resolution:800-1200-1600 DPI Frequency:2402-2408MAZ Maximum Acceleration:14 inches per second Work Channel:34 channel frequency hopping Operating System:Windows Mac OS Working Voltage:DC 5V USB Interface:1.1/2.0 ♐
Keyboard Mouse Matching Mode
Since some computer cpus cannot recognize the universal 2.4G multi-threaded wireless universal driver some computers may not work properly with the keyboard or mouse ●When the keyboard is not working properly Press the 【ESC+K】button at the same time until the keyboard indicator begins to flash then plug in the USB receiver until the keyboard indicator stops flashing(driver identification match is complete) You can use the wireless keyboard normally ●When the mouse is not working properly Please insert the USB receive then press the 【Scroll Wheel+ Right Button】for 3-5 seconds at the same time,your wireless moue adaptation is completed You can use the wireless mouse normally
Note
➊The 2.4G USB receiver is stored inside the mouse and can be taken out for use ➋There is a ON/OFF switch at the bottom of mouse ➌ It support Windows 2000/ME/XP/Vista/7/8/10,Mac OS X ◕‿◕｡ If there is any questions,pls contact with us freely.we will offer you best service.thanks for your visiting Soseeln shop If you love it ,then ADD TO CART now
features: 【Bright Backlit Keyboard】Its backlight design makes your keyboard look cool at night.［Fn+Scrlk］turn on/off the backlight［Fn+Pgup］luminance+［Fn+Pgdn］luminance-.There are 3 levels of brightness

【Rechargeable keyboard & mouse】They both can get a quick charging with the USB cable,(Fully charged about 2-3 hours ),No need to replace batteries,convenient and environmental.(Pls charge the product for 12 hours before first use to activate the built-in battery)

【Wireless 2.4G Driver-free】This keyboard and mouse set adopts advanced 2.4GHz wireless technology,and the wireless distance up to 10m( 33ft);Share a usb receiver,plug and play,and high quality USB interface can provide efficient and stable data transmission

【Auto Sleep Design,Power Saving】Adopt the industry's top chip, which is 5 times power-saving than ordinary keyboard mouse combo.The mouse auto into sleep mode for 8 minutes not use, the keyboard is 5 minutes,the backlight turn off,and press any key to wake up

【High Quality and Good Choice】104 dual-color injection keys,long time use without discoloration;12 combinations of multimedia shortcut keys;3 adjustable DPI levels(800-1200-1600),control your own cursor speed freely. The mouse use aluminum alloy 3D non-slip roller,very comfortable

reviews.title: Excellent keyboard and mouse for the price
reviews.text: I was not looking for a gaming keyboard just wanted a backlit, wireless keyboard.  The lights in my home office hurt my eyes so when I need to work after dark all I really need is the screen on for light.  This keyboard allows me to work anytime without turning the lights on.  Easy to charge and can charge it while using it.

reviews.title: Sweet Keyboard
reviews.text: This is a great wireless keyboard.  The range is great and the backlit is very helpful in low light situations, plus it looks really cool.  Had some issues with the keyboard after return period had passed.  I contacted the seller thinking it wouldn't go anywhere.  I was wrong!  They returned my email quickly and was eager to resolve my problem, which they did.  I am extremely pleased with the keyboard and customer support I received.

title: VELOCIFIRE Keycap Puller Tool, 3 in 1 Keycap Puller, Stainless Steel Keycap Removal Tool, Key Pulling, Loosen, Tighten Keycap Stem, Expert for Mechanical Keyboard(Black)
features: This wire style keycap puller is a necessary tool for any mechanical keyboard owner. Easily remove and replace keycaps with this keycap removal tool.
Creative two-stage combination design, multifunctional keycap puller, one part is keycap puller, one part is keycap stem adjust.
You just need to place the keycap puller metal at the bottom of the keycap and pull the keycap out vertically.
Round body shape designed for maximum comfort.Compatible for most mechanical keyboards including Cherry MX，Kailh, Outemu, and Content Switches.
Wires can bend outward to fit onto every key except the spacebar. (The spacebar key can be removed by hand after the surrounding keys are removed).

reviews.title: It's good, but it doesn't fit Daskeyboard keys
reviews.text: I have a das keyboard.  This doesn't fit over the keys.  I had to twist and bend it to make it work.  It's not the right tool for a das keyboard.  With that said, it's a good quality tool.  I would buy it again for something with smaller keys.  Just don't bother for the mechanical das keyboard.

title: DROP + Invyr Holy Panda Mechanical Keyboard Switches - Plate Mounted Tactile Switches, Cherry MX Style, 67g Spring, by Kailh (70 PCS)
features: THE MOST TACTILE SWITCHES IN THE WORLD: With a name like Holy Panda, these switches had to be epic. Made with stems from Halo switches, housing found on Invyr Panda switches, Holy Panda switches combine the best of both worlds.
THE BEST OF BOTH WORLDS: The result is a snappy, tactile switch that is satisfying to type on.

COMPATIBILITY: Holy Panda switches are compatible with plate-mounted Cherry-style PCB's and are perfect for hot-swap compatible barebones kits such as the Drop ALT, CTRL, SHIFT, ENTR, Carina, Planck, and Preonic.
SPECS: Halo Switch Stems, Polycarbonate top housing, Nylon bottom housing, 67g spring, Plate Mount, and MX-compatible.

reviews.title: Excellent tactile
reviews.text:
I have purchased these, lubed Glorious Panda, and Tecsee Purple panda.

This is the best with the other 2 being very close to as good as this. The tactile-ness is a little better than the other both. With the other 2, the tactile is right at the beginning, while this one starts at the beginning and seems to feel the same until bottoming out. All have the nice bump back.

I didn't lube these and they sound and feel great. I think this is my favorite tactile now. But if you're on budget, I would recommend one of the others.

reviews.title: Not a bad one in the bunch
reviews.text: Got the 90 pack and not a broken or bent pin in the entire bunch. Professionally packed and working 100 percent. All switches tested and working fine. A little expensive but worth it for the fast Amazon delivery.

title: Matcha Keycaps Set 124 Keys XDA PBT Keycaps Dye Sublimation Fit for 61/64/87/104/108 Cherry Mx Switches Mechanical Keyboard

reviews.title: Nice keycaps
reviews.text: Fits my Anne Pro case without issue. Nice colors and easy to type with.

reviews.title: Great for the price!
reviews.text: This is a clone set as far as I'm aware, but I don't mind that. The arrows are cuter than the "original" Matcha set that can be found for the same price. These feel great, sound great, look great. I couldn't be happier!

reviews.title: these are sweeeet
reviews.text: They're really good quality for the price! Very retro. Use them to replace the ugly keychron ones you get with a keyboard.

reviews.title: Lovely green color
reviews.text: My keyboard only has like 64 keys so most of them I don’t use. But they are great, easy to put in. Fits my desk theme very well :))

title: EPOMAKER Mix 1.8m Coiled Type-C to USB A TPU Mechanical Keyboard Space Cable with Detachable Aviator Connector for Gaming Keyboard and Cellphone(Grey)

Choose from our different color options, it comes easy for you to match your keyboard and top off your setup. Besides that, this cable features all you want and need: Double-shielded USB 2.0 compliant, 61-gauge, 4-conductor, etc

【Durable and Flexible】Epomaker custom MIX cable is durable and flexible due to the strict selection of the durable techflex and PP double-sleeves raw materials. The coiled design enables the cables easily to integrate into a wide range of spaces

【USB-C Interface, USB 2.0/3.0 Compatible】For versatile connectivity, each one is equipped with a detachable aviator port to accommodate different connectors. Included in this run is a USB-C connector cable to fit modern boards

【Various Colors Choices】The cable is designed in various vivid colors to match different keyboard trend. Epomaker custom MIX cable is dedicated to adding more vibrant energy to your daily life and work. Solid color, contrast colors, or one with various colors like a rainbow? It is up to you! Get one to match your keyboard right away!

reviews.title: That's not what I expected
reviews.text: The cable does not have the diameter of the expected coils and the aviator connector is not of good quality. I don't think it will last long.

reviews.title: Nice looking and a great add for keyboard enthusiasts!
reviews.text:
Do you need a cable with an aviator connection? No, but do you want one? Yes! I like the mesh sleave on the cable, that gives a premium look and a perceived ruggedness. I chose the grey so whatever keyboard I hook up (or any USB-c peripheral) it looks nice.

Only ding I would give it is that if the keyboard needs to be to the left the cable off the coils is on top and does not look as nice. If the cable is oriented to the right, it looks better. I don't have any major issues here, but it is something that shoudl be in the product description maybe.

Overall, really nice and glad I bought it!

title: SNAP 75% Mechanical Keyboard Kit (White)
description: A stylish, 75% split The SNAP is a 75% split mechanical keyboard kit with support for 2 rotary encoders, 2 OLED displays, speaker, and RGB underglow. We took all the best parts of the NIBBLE and added some of the most popular requests: true split shift/space/backspace. The SNAP is configurable, programmable, and easily assembled. 100% through hole design The SNAP uses a Pro Micro MCU instead of a discrete micro-controller chip. It offers the fun and aesthetic of a kit without having to worry about soldering the difficult bits like USB connectors. All required parts diodes, caps, and ICs) are through-hole, meaning they're easy and forgiving to solder. underglow LEDs are surface-mount Multiple Layout Options Use the SNAP in split mode, or snap it whoa, get it?) together for a more traditional layout. Strong internal magnets hold the two sides together and magical spring-loaded pogo pin contacts mean there's no need for a TRRS cable when the two sides are attached. The SNAP supports many configurations and layouts: Split space/backspace, split shift, ISO enter, and more. Since it runs QMK firmware and uses VIA, it's easy to change keymaps, program macros, and customize functionality. RGB underglow ready 10x optional bottom-mounted SMT LEDs shine nicely through the acrylic support material. Included Top & bottom PCB Acrylic supports M2 standoffs & screws Diodes, ICs, decoupling caps, reset switch RGB underglow, speaker, magnets, and pogo pins Rotary encoder & color-matched knob TRRS cable and mini bumpons Not included 2x Bit-Cs or Pro Micro Compatible MCU MX-compatible switches & keycaps PCB-mount stabilizers NOTE: This is a kit which requires assembly and soldering! Bit-Cs, switches, keycaps, and other accessories are sold separately
features: The SNAP is a high-quality split 75% keyboard kit with tons of room for customization
Use the SNAP together, or separate! It snaps together for a traditional 75% layout or pulls apart for use as a split board
Built around a Pro Micro, rather than a discrete microcontroller. This saves assembly time, and also reduces the build difficulty
All required parts (diodes, caps, and ICs) are through-hole, meaning they're easy and forgiving to solder

RGB underglow ready: 10x optional bottom-mounted SMT LEDs shine nicely through the acrylic support material. RGB underglow is supported natively in QMK, allowing for easy programming and configuration

reviews.title: Not for the faint of heart
reviews.text:
This kit does take a lot of work so I would not recommend it as a first build, or for someone looking for a quick build.

It is also a fairly unique one of a kind kit. I don't know of other split 75% keyboards with pro micro support that also have great documentation, support and community. If you are willing to put in the time you will be rewarded with a unique keyboard, and the kit really is fun to put together for experienced builders.

I would knock down half star as I encountered some issues with the fitting of the acrylic plate, specifically in these areas:
1. acrylic plate fitting at the keyboard split edge, had to use an exacto knife
2. acrylic plate fitting with bottom screws of the PCB mount stabilizers, had to make the holes wider
3. snap magnets did not fit, gave up trying to fit these
4. components pin through the solder joints interfered with acrylic, this is expected and is easily fixable by trimming them down.

Apart from that everything worked as expected. Firmware worked on first try and I was easily able to get it working with VIA.

reviews.title: Great keyboard
reviews.text: Great keyboard

title: KINESIS USB-A Freestyle Pro Quiet Ergonomic Split Mechanical Keyboard (Cherry MX Silent Red Switches)
features: AWARD-WINNING SPLIT DESIGN: Advanced ergonomics for all body types and preferences via adjustable split, splay, and tent (tenting accessories sold separately). New cable storage compartment supports up to 20" of separation when you need it.

GENUINE CHERRY MECHANICAL SWITCHES FOR PREMIUM TYPING FEEL AND PERFORMANCE WITH LESS NOISE: Cherry MX "Silent" red mechanical switches feature a low activation force, linear feel and are rated for 50M key presses for unmatched durability.

FULL ONBOARD PROGRAMMABILITY WITH THE DRIVERLESS SMARTSET ENGINE: 9 custom layouts, 8 office hotkeys, on-the-fly macro recording, one-touch key remapping, pre-configured Mac and Dvorak layouts, settings saved to keyboards 4MB flash memory, and the SmartSet App GUI for Windows & Mac.
PLUG-AND-PLAY WITH ALL MAJOR OPERATING SYSTEMS: Windows 7-10, Mac OS X, Linux, Chrome.
2 YEAR MANUFACTURER'S WARRANTY: Buy with confidence knowing that Kinesis engineers all our products in the USA to the highest standards and stands behind them 100 percent since 1992.

reviews.title: Good, but could be better
reviews.text:
I use this with my MacBook Pro. I have brutal pain in my hands, wrists and forearms from osteoarthritis, tendon-patchy and tendonitis; caused from 19 years of being at my computer and holding my phone up for blogging.

This keyboard has made things so much better, however... I needed the keyboard to have the lift without the wrist pads which are agony for my hands. Only, the tent system is made to include all pieces; the lift and the wrist pads. So, I have to use the lift pieces without the wrist pads which leaves a chunk of awkward plastic sticking straight out from the keyboard; something I am constantly catching. It's frustrating to no end.

I am now looking for something I can simply glue to the inner, underside of the keyboard that will add the lift but leave the front open.

I'm also disappointed with the price. Come on now. It's sooooo overpriced. It's only a matter of time before another brand comes out with a more reasonable one- but in the meantime, I feel like they are taking advantage.

In the end, this is far better than nothing. It definitely places your hands in a more ergonomic position, and is better than a flat keyboard or laptop touchpad setup.

reviews.title: Great keyboard for ergonomics
reviews.text: The split keyboard layout has been great for my shoulders and arms.  It took a couple of weeks for me to get used to the layout but the extra functions offered on the edges of the keyboard are very helpful.  Being able to replace the key caps is huge.  I really love this keyboard.

reviews.title: Quality material, but as wide as TKL keyboards
reviews.text:
I wish the length of the cable was longer, and that a longer cable can be purchased separately.
For the price, the tenting should be standard, but it is a separate purchase. And, without them, this keyboard isn't as great.

I purchased the tenting separately, and it really helps with ergonomics when typing. But, when gaming it tends to push my hands side and down, so it's better to use a separate palm support.

I was surprised that when the keyboard is laid out, it is as wide as a ten keyless keyboard. I was hoping that it would be shorter, so that the mouse has more room. It's fine for work or just typing. For gaming, I'll put the right section farther up. Or, I'll put it above the keyboard tray, so I still have access to the keys when needed. That frees up a lot of room for the mouse.

The quality of the keyboard is great. Everything feels solid. The keys feel wonderful. And, the ergonomics is great for typing.
The tech support was friendly and helpful. I had a bit of a problem early on with customizing the keys, and their tech support promptly helped me.

reviews.title: Great keyboard
reviews.text: Nice quiet keyboard with a great feel.  I got the tenting and wrist rest kit.  It took a little bit to get used to the angle but I'm really enjoying it and have already programmed some of the keys to do routine things for me.

reviews.title: Perfect balance of ergonomics and key comfort.
reviews.text:
I have tried all the Kinesis keyboards with the exception of the 400$ console setup. I have chosen this one as the best overall experience, specifically paired with the VIP3Pro tent and wrist accessory. The keys on this keyboard have a much more consistent and pleasant feeling as compared to their membrane offerings as well as their silent switch option. Those keyboards are fantastic if you are not already addicted to the feeling of mechanical keys. However if you are searching for the ultimate in keyboard experiences for daily use, I heavily and without reservation recommend this keyboard set. The keyboard may initially seem expensive when compared to other ergonomic keyboards that do not split or offer the tenting/wrist rests, however having tried many different curved and non split ergonomic options from Microsoft, Logitech, and many others, I can say without a doubt that the optimal configuration requires the keyboard to be split. If you need to have a number pad like I do, I suggest any simple number key option, they'll fit nicely between the two halves and do not interfere at all. I plan to purchase a second keyboard for my WFH setup to compliment my work setup. I don't want to go back to a standard keyboard and you won't either after using it.

This review was not endorsed, sponsored, or influenced by any 3rd party, I am simply that overjoyed with the product.

title: CUSTOMIZATIONS Coiled USB c Cable, Customized Gaming Mechanical Keyboard Cable, Handwork Braided + PET mesh, Metal Plug, with Detachable Metal Aviator Connector (Black White)
features: [Multiple color options] CUSTOMIZATIONS coiled keyboard cable has various eye-catching color settings, which can provide more interesting elements for your desktop settings.

[keyboard Coiled cables, durable quality]: This custom coiled cable uses four high-quality copper wires and aluminum shielding foil as the core. The material is not afraid of bending or breaking. The weaving adopts woven mesh + PET mesh double-layer weaving, and the resin mesh is both beautiful and durable.

[Metal aviator connector]: The metal cannon connector allows you to quickly connect different cables to the keyboard or other accessories. The pure copper is chrome-plated, the copper needle and the copper core are plated with 24K gold wire, and the shell adopts electroplating technology to achieve a bright texture, highlighting high-end and texture.

[Coiled USB C Cable, USB 2.0 compatible] The cable adopts Type-C interface design, aluminum alloy CNC shell, sandblasted surface, corrosion and oxidation resistance, and recessed design can match most keyboards.

[Excellent quality]: This Coiled Cable has experienced multiple technical tests, including data transmission stability, Cable is firm and durable, and the joint welding is firm. Each product you have got is high quality.

reviews.title: Works great
reviews.text: This USB C cable works great! It's appears to be high quality material and I really like the coiled style. Very impressed!

title: TECWARE Phantom 87 Key Mechanical Keyboard, RGB led, Outemu Brown Switch
features: RGB BACKLIGHTING - Enhance your gaming experience with 18 pre-set configurations on the mechanical keyboard, or create a unique one to match your setup

OUTEMU SWITCHES - The gaming mechanical keyboard comes with Outemu mechanical switches for precise gaming and comfortable typing. Spare switches + keycap & switch remover tools are provided for easy replacement
FIBERGLASS PCB - Built with SMD LEDs and FR-4 fiberglass printed circuit board, this Tecware mechanical keyboard is able to withstand extended periods of intensive and hardcore gaming sessions

DOUBLE-SHOT KEYCAPS – Featuring an all-new font, the keycaps on this mechanical keyboard are double-shot ABS (dual-injection molding process) which guarantee high resistance against surface wear; markings that cannot be worn off as they are physically part of the keycaps

SPEED ADVANTAGE - With full N-key rollover and 1000Hz pooling rate, Tecware keyboards allow faster and smoother gaming experience. The depression of each key is detected individually, meaning all key presses will be registered, no matter how many keys you press down simultaneously

reviews.title: Great quality
reviews.text: Very bright lights. Click clack noise keys. Small the way I like it. Portable. Works great. Has usb cover cap too.

reviews.title: Excellent keyboard.
reviews.text: This is my first mechanical keyboard and I really love the quality of this keyboard. The LED's are bright and on keyboard LED controls are very useful as you don't have to depend on the software. The keyboard feels very premium and on par with any other expensive keyboard. I would highly recommend this to others looking for new mechanical keyboard.

reviews.title: the smaller one with the browns... i love it

reviews.title: You Like Red, White & Blue So Make Your Keyboard Reflect That!
reviews.text: We started doing this with our “high-end” computer buyers. We take a premium – Cherry or similar – keyboard and remove all or most of the key tops replacing them with the various colors available making a color complementary computer input device. It makes for a more interesting keyboard, which obviously is the main interface with your computer, and it gives our customers something so unique as to be one-of-a-kind. All the keyboards start with premium red, blue, brown, or black key actuators which, without exception, are the best available. That together with our customer’s keytops “artwork” gives a person something exclusive as well as offering superior functionality. The keytops come right off use the small plastic tool most of the keytop provides include with their kits and doing a whole keyboard only takes about 20 minutes. One thing you do have to watch for is the keytop height. Many times, they will make certain keys a little higher. This poses no issue unless you stick a high key in the middle of the number/letters, then this may impede faster typists. Remember each key actuator that is attached to the base of the keyboard is programmed to send a certain signal to the computer thus causing your monitor to display that letter/number or take that action. For example, if you put the “M” keytop where the “T” was that will still send a “T” to your computer and monitor. I would recommend removing and replacing 2 or 3 at a time or having a like keyboard to refer to, so the possibility for confusion is limited. All keyboards don’t have the exact layout especially in the extended section and number pad. Also, some of the higher end gaming style keyboards have extra programmable keys that are specified through the keyboard manufacturer’s software. Some of the keytop set will provide blank keys to use in these instances. Buy a couple sets and have fun making your own custom keyboard.

reviews.title: Great color for white keyboard, good quality
reviews.text: The NACODEX 129 Keys PBT Keycaps Set is a high-quality and visually appealing upgrade for any mechanical keyboard. The keycaps are made of durable PBT material and feature a JSA profile and double shot design. The pink and white color combination gives a unique touch to the keyboard, making it a great choice for those who want to personalize their setup. The keycaps are compatible with Cherry, Gateron, Otemu, and Kailh switches, making them a versatile choice for many different types of mechanical keyboards. Overall, this keycap set is a great investment for anyone looking to improve the look and feel of their keyboard.

reviews.title: Nice keys, font size a little horsey
reviews.text:
Note: I chose the Grey/Beige set. This set (YMDK 96 84 ANSI ISO Key) went on just fine, and are a great frugal find.

I bought these for an relatively inexpensive TKL mechanical wireless keyboard (RK87G) because the OEM keycaps were set in a truly fugly and illegible typeface.

These YMDKs feel good, and have a slightly deeper "thunk" when they bottom out. The two-character keys are typeset vertically, as Underwood and Remington intended. Although the font size on most of the keys is a big, they are fine and give the keyboard a bit of a homemade retro look.

NOTE Specific to the RK87G: This YMDK set does not have a ScrlLk key. The right Shift and right CTRL on this set are a little too small, so I just left the old ones on. I also left the OEM ScrlLk, Page Up, and arrow keys on because they have symbols for controlling the RGB LEDs. If you use the RKs function keys for app and control shortcuts, you may want to leave those on as well.

May 30, 2021
I've had these for a little over six months now. Still a great value set the money. I installed them on a keyboard I use for hours on end nearly every day. The printing on the beige keys hasn't faded, but I've noticed that the grey keys with white printing are beginning to fade. I'm not taking any stars off because before I purchased these I had already read other reviewers who had the same experience.

Do note that this set does not come with a long shift or scroll lock cap. This isn't an issue as they'll be going on a 65% for me but if you're looking to put them on a full size board you may be disappointed.

reviews.title: Kawaii !!
reviews.text: Comes with all the keys caps you need, love how smooth it feels. You may need to dim your keyboard brightness, found the light through the clear key caps can hurt your eyes after a while.

reviews.title: Exceptionally perfect feel EXCEPT no way to find your position!
reviews.text:
I wanted to love these key caps. They look great! They feel superb and their smooth texture is exactly what I wanted.

However, two major flaws: I didn't even know this was a thing to consider, but they don't have bumps on the positioning keys "F" and "J". So if you type a lot and remove your hands from the keys, you need to look down every time to find your position. This interrupts my workflow as a transcriptionist quite a bit. The other disadvantage is that the smooth feel of the material also makes it impossible to keep skin oil, snack residues, etc. from being left behind on these caps, making them somewhat difficult to grip after the first half hour.

reviews.title: Really nice visual upgrade
reviews.text:
I wanted to upgrade my keyboard’s appearance, and after much Googling I settled on this product. I have a full size 104 key keyboard, and looking at keycaps on various websites makes it seem kinda complicated to know which set I’d need for my specific keyboard (Das Keyboard 4). Some Ctrl keys are wider than others, Spacebars shorter than others, etc. and what I liked about this set is that it includes different length keys and you just use the one that fits your keyboard and ignore the rest.

This is my first set of keycaps so I can’t really speak with any knowledge to the quality of the keys, but I’m really happy with how they look. They feel similar to the ones that came with my keyboard but look muuuuch better.

reviews.title: Fantastic keycap set
reviews.text:
They finally arrived! I plan on putting these keycaps on a 75% keyboard that won't arrive for another couple of months so in the pictures, I only put it on part of my keyboard to test them out. I want to "preserve" that new keycap feeling later. :)

These keycaps are fairly thick and have the standard PBT texture. The doubleshot legends are quite clear and none of the spacebars are warped! This is a new profile I've never typed on and I can't find much information on the web about it so I included a lot of pictures. I compared them in the pictures to my Ducky keyboard with doubleshot ABS. They actually aren't too different from OEM keycap profile (from the Ducky) height but some of the rows are higher. They're much more shapely and the F and J keys have a deeper dish. Compared to DSA keycaps, they don't seem to be quite as deep dishey overall which I actually prefer.
The keycaps fit snug on cherry mx brown stems, more so than my Ducky keycaps. They aren't hard to put on though. Some of the stems have a small part of plastic missing from the MX cross area but it's only a handful of the keycaps and it didn't effect the fit. I've included photos of this as well.
Overall they're great keycaps that I won't be using yet until my keyboard for them arrives.

reviews.title: Best keycaps I have ever used.
reviews.text:
Bought these for my GMMK pro.

I have owned several mechanical keyboards, but never bought a high-end set of keycaps. Unlike every other set I've ever used, these just seem to ignore dirt and grease. I can stuff my face with a big Mac and go straight to typing, and the caps stay completely clean. I don't know how that works but I won't question it.

Other keyboards require weekly wipe downs, I have never had to do it with these caps.

They're also noticeably built well. These are going to outlast my fingers by a hundred years, likely.

reviews.title: Legend doesn’t glow like other pics
reviews.text: For my Tofu65, I do like these pudding key caps, but I’m not sure why the legends on my key caps aren’t transparent. Everyone who posted reviews with pics show their legends glowing, so I’m not sure why mine are different. My other issue is I got several duplicative keys, and I’m missing a few. For example, I only have one home key and about 4 page down keys. So that’s slightly annoying. I’ve seen some others complain about this similar thing as well. But the feel and look of these key caps are quality. Slightly disappointed.

Pair up to 4 Devices with Seamless Switch: The keyboard supports 3 Bluetooth and 1 wired connectivity. Only simply press switch button at the top right corner to switch between Bluetooth and wired mode. (For more details about Bluetooth connectivity please scroll down to product description)
Responsive and Fluid Keystrokes for Heavy Users: All key anti-ghosting and lifespan of over 50 million clicks provide fluid and responsive typing experience for writers, gamers, coders, etc.

Beautiful White Lighting Effects: The various lighting effects allow you to type day or night while decorating your desktop setups . Only need to fiddle with the “return” bar and left-hand knob to change lighting effects and its brightness.

Long Lasting Battery: With 2000mah rechargeable battery only about 6 hours charging the keyboard has 16-hour continuouse working time (backlighting on). Note: Working time may vary based on use and computer conditions.

What You Get: 1 x Retro Typewriter Keyboard, 2 x Blue Switch, 1 x Metal Switch Puller, 1 x USB-C Cable for Charging/Connection, 1 x User Manual; 12-month warranty & a ready support team for any issues.

reviews.title: LOVE IT
reviews.text: I absolutely 💯 ♥️ love this keyboard! It reminds me of typing class in high school. If you want nostalgia this is your product. It does make a very satisfying loud clicking when typing so do not buy if you need something quiet. Now my sister wants one too!

reviews.title: I am in love
reviews.text: I never thought I can fall in love with a keyboard! This keyboard is esthetically beautiful. I love this clicking sound…not quite like the real typewriter but kinda close:)  Light effects make typing even more fun

reviews.title: Beautiful keyboard
reviews.text: The keyboard is absolutely unique and stunning, I just received it yesterday so I have not typed on it very much but it seems pretty heavy duty and the back lighting is awesome especially with bad eyesight, The return arm regulates the lights to make it very smooth to adjust, The typewriter knobs actually do the volume on your computer so all in all I do love the keyboard, The wireless feature actually was pretty easy to set up just read the instructions carefully!  I have never spent more than $40 on a keyboard and wireless mouse but I have to tell you well worth it.

reviews.title: nice build. aesthetically interesting looking.
reviews.text: I tried to return this thinking it has connectivity issues but troubleshot my way to realize it was OS messin' with me.  Glad I gave it a another whirl because it's really nice!  one thing it does do is the lower keys next to the space button are all the same height and my fat lower palm always hits them and sends me to the beginning of the sentence I'm writing.  Annoying and somewhat dangerous for my line of work but I solved it by putting elevation risers at the front raising it approximately another 8-10 degrees.  Would have been nice if it had elevation standoffs as standard equipment.  bluetooth on this is fantastic and responsive.
